input_dict.agent_role: Integrate second-hop evidence with first-hop context and retain the facts needed to answer the question.
input_dict.question: Who was a Greek film director Andrew Lau or Yannis Smaragdis?
input_dict.current_output: Yannis (Iannis) Smaragdis is the Greek film director; Andrew Lau is a Hong Kong film director. Passage 1 explicitly identifies "Yannis Smaragdis | Iannis Smaragdis ... is a Greek film director," and other passages list films directed by him, corroborating the claim.

upstream_context.question: Who was a Greek film director Andrew Lau or Yannis Smaragdis?
upstream_context.summary_1: Passage 1 states "Iannis Smaragdis ... is a Greek film director." Passage 6 states "Andrew Lau ... is a Hong Kong film director, producer, and cinematographer." The passages therefore identify Yannis/Iannis Smaragdis as the Greek film director (no further retrieval required).
hop2_docs: Yannis Smaragdis | Iannis Smaragdis (Greek: Γιάννης Σμαραγδής ) is a Greek film director.

El Greco (soundtrack) | El Greco Original Motion Picture Soundtrack is a soundtrack album featuring the music score for the 2007 film "El Greco", by Greek electronic composer Vangelis, released in Greece and Cyprus by Universal Music Greece.  The film, directed by Yannis Smaragdis, follows the life of Greek painter, Doménicos Theotokópoulos, as he travels to Italy and Spain where he becomes known as El Greco (The Greek).  Vangelis previously worked with Yannis Smaragdis on his 1996 movie about the Greek poet Kavafis (a.k.a. Cavafy).  It won the award for best music score at the 48th Greek State Film Awards in 2007.

Nikolaos Smaragdis | Nikolaos Smaragdis (born (1982--)12 1982 ) is a Greek male volleyball player.  He was part of the Greece men's national volleyball team at the 2006 FIVB Volleyball Men's World Championship in Japan. . Smaragdis has won 9 times the Greek Championship.  He is also the only Greek Volleyball player who achieved it, with four different clubs.
Smaragdis | Smaragdis is a Greek surname.  Notable persons with this name include:
Alaloum | Alaloum (Greek: Greek: Αλαλούμ ) is a 1982 Greek comedy film directed by Giorgos Apostolidis, Giannis Smaragdis and Giannis Typaldos, starring Harry Klynn, Manos Destounis and Joly Garbi.

Homecoming Song | Homecoming Song (Greek: Το Τραγούδι της Επιστροφής , translit.  To tragoudi tis epistrofis) is a 1983 Greek drama film directed by Yannis Smaragdis.  It was entered into the 13th Moscow International Film Festival.

God Loves Caviar | God Loves Caviar (Greek: Ο Θεός αγαπάει το χαβιάρι , translit.  O Theós agapáei to chaviári; in Russia known as Pirates of the Aegean Sea) is a 2012 Russo-Greek drama film directed by Yannis Smaragdis.
